task_description: Fix all UI/UX issues identified in the comprehensive review across 21 pages: extract shared CSS components, eliminate inline styles, fix design token compliance, create shared StatusDot and TabsPill components, and clean up dead code

verification.summary: npm run typecheck and npm run build both pass cleanly. All 21 pages build successfully. All acceptance criteria verified: no 18px border-radius, no #1f4d7a gradient, no emoji icons in refactored pages, navbar.tsx deleted, StatusDot and TabsPill components created.
